Off Calendar Jan-04-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

MOTION FOR FINAL DISTRIBUTION OF PROCEEDS OF SALE, FOR AUTHORITY TO MAKE DISTRIBUTION, FOR REFEREE FEES AND CSOTS, REQUEST FOR AUTHORITY TO MAINTAIN A CLOSING RESERVE, AND REQUEST TO BE DISCHARGED AS REFEREE is GRANTED as requested. Referee to prepare an order.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Motion For Final Distribution Of Proceeds Of Sale, For Authority To Make Distribution, For Referee Fees And Costs, Request For Authority To Maintain A Closing Reserve, And Request To Be Discharged As Referee
Off Calendar Dec-07-2023 Continued To Jan-04-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Amy Harrington; 415-558-7700; Partition Referee, appearing in pro per.

Ms. Harrington informs the court that there were some numerical errors in her moving papers, and that she has submitted an ameded motion. However, the amended motion was unable to be processed and brought before the court in time for the hearing. Ms. Harrington requests a continuance, and the court grants the request. The court rules as follows:

REFEREE'S MOTION FOR FINAL DISTRIBUTION OF SALE PROCEEDS is continued to January 4, 2024 at 9:30am in Department 501.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Referee'S Final Report Of Sale Of Real Property Located At 44-46 Morrell Street Pursuant To Stipulation For Partition Dated 2-14-2023; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Approval Of Referee Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jun-20-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Amy Harrington, Esq. 415-558-7700 Moving party and court appointed referee.
robert Reeves Cross, Esq. 415-979-9800 Skootisky & Der LLP for Defendant Ku et al. (in-person)

RULING - Hearing is held. Ms Harrington reports there are no overbids and parties have filed a stipulated interlocutory judgment. Mr. Cross submits a hard copy of the proposed interlocutory judgment to the Court. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

MOTION FOR REFEREE'S FINAL REPORT OF SALE OF REAL PROPERTY LOCATED AT 44-46 MORRELL STREET PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FOR PARTITION DATED 2-14-2023.

The Court Approves the sale. Moving party to submit a proposed form of order.

Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (501/cfh)
